title: Onboarding - Organized, Up-to-Date, Personal screens - App in the background
scenario: Onboarding flow state and animation are preserved when app is backgrounded and resumed after progressing through Organized, Up-to-Date, and Personal screens
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
5. Put the app in the background (e.g., press the Home button or switch to another app).
7. Reopen the app by tapping the app icon or switching back to it.
expected: The user is returned to the same onboarding screen they were on (e.g., 'Personal') with the animation still playing/working correctly.
